problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: The key to How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? is Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species — specifically Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
